description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray or off-white color, complemented by dark window frames and roof trim. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard features a spacious deck area, a rectangular swimming pool, and patches of green lawn, as well as a small garden bed. There is a prominent balcony or terrace on the upper floor, partially enclosed with glass or railing. The main entryway is marked by double doors with glass panels, set beneath a subtle overhang.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a backyard featuring a pool and deck. The exterior is light gray with dark trim and includes a balcony and garden area.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entryway with double doors, multiple windows, and the flat roof's dark trim.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the backyard deck, swimming pool, garden beds, and upper balcony area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, deck, green lawn, and access to the backyard from the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal windows and a clear view of the flat roof and side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features double glass doors beneath a subtle overhang, with no porch or columns, emphasizing a minimalist modern aesthetic.
